• Automatically play animations in Slack
Keyboard
You can improve the way you use Slack by learning our
handy keyboard shortcuts.
Press
in the empty message field to:
• Move focus to the message list
The most recent message in the list will be selected
• Move focus to the message list, only if the message field is empty
The most recent message in the list will be selected
• Edit your last message
The last message you sent will be selected and in editing mode
Note: You can always press
+
to edit your last message.
Lists keyboard interactions
Choose how you want to use your keyboard with lists.
• Data entry mode (default)
Use Tab to move horizontally, Enter to move vertically between cells
• Full keyboard mode (best for assistive technology)
Use Tab to move between interactive elements, Enter to edit
Screen reader
Customize your screen reader experience
